scripts.title: Arm Holdings Surges
scripts.hook: Arm Holdings jumped over 11 percent today.

beats.vo: The chip designer soared alongside the broader semiconductor sector, which saw renewed interest with the artificial intelligence trade reigniting.
beats.caption: Chip Sector Gains, AI Trade

beats.vo: This strong market sentiment also pushed other chip-related stocks like AMD and Micron significantly higher during the session.
beats.caption: Other Chips Follow

beats.vo: Arm's stock closed the day trading for just over 333 dollars, contributing to the Nasdaq's gains as U.S. stocks moved higher overall.
beats.caption: ARM: Over $333

scripts.cta: What are your thoughts on chip stocks?
scripts.disclaimer: For information only — not financial advice.
scripts.fbCaption: Arm Holdings led the market higher today, surging over 11 percent as the semiconductor sector caught fire with renewed AI enthusiasm. Find out why it and other chip stocks jumped! #ArmHoldings #ChipStocks #AITrade #MarketMovers

scripts.title: Market Recap: Chip Rally, Retail Dip
scripts.hook: AMD climbed more than 7 percent today.

beats.vo: The chipmaker saw strong gains as the artificial intelligence trade reignited, boosting many semiconductor stocks across the board.
beats.caption: AMD: AI Trade Boosts Chips

beats.vo: Meanwhile, Micron also surged over 7 percent, moving in tandem with other chip-related companies leading the sector's gains.
beats.caption: Micron: Chip Sector Gains

beats.vo: On the downside, Costco fell about 4 and a half percent, as it was among the S&P 500 stocks gapping down today.
beats.caption: Costco: S&P Gap Down

beats.vo: And Palantir dropped over 4 percent, also moving with other S&P 500 stocks that saw declines in today's session.
beats.caption: Palantir: S&P Weakness

scripts.disclaimer: For information only — not financial advice.
scripts.fbCaption: Today's market saw a big rally in chip stocks like AMD and Micron, while Costco and Palantir faced headwinds. Get the full rundown on these top movers! #MarketRecap #AMD #Micron #Costco #Palantir #StockMarketNews

scripts.title: Middle East Tensions & Home Sales
scripts.hook: Geopolitical tensions in the Middle East were a key focus today.

beats.vo: Iran reported hitting US military targets in the Gulf and stated it fired ballistic missiles at a base in Jordan.
beats.caption: Iran Hits US Targets

beats.vo: Despite these headlines, the S&P 500 and Nasdaq still opened higher, largely driven by strong gains in the chip sector.
beats.caption: Markets Open Higher

beats.vo: On the economic front, June home sales disappointed, dropping month-over-month as housing prices reached an all-time high.
beats.caption: June Home Sales Disappoint

scripts.cta: How are these headlines affecting your investments?
scripts.disclaimer: For information only — not financial advice.
scripts.fbCaption: Today's market navigated geopolitical tensions in the Middle East and disappointing home sales data. Despite the headlines, chip stocks powered a higher open for major indices. #MarketHeadlines #Geopolitics #HousingMarket #EconomicNews
